blocks.content: I earned a Master of Engineering in Robotics from the University of Maryland, College Park, with a GPA of 3.70 out of 4.0. My coursework included Cognitive Robotics, Natural Language Processing, Visual Learning and Recognition, Perception-Planning-Control of Robotic Systems, and Rehabilitation Robotics.

I earned a Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering from Savitribai Phule Pune University with a GPA of 8.11 out of 10. My capstone focused on the design, analysis, and development of a connecting rod for a V12 internal combustion engine, including strength, fatigue, and dynamic loading analysis.
